name: Lemon-Cinnamon Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Pulverized baking ammonia (sold at pharmacies)
or 1 teaspoon Cream of tartar (mixed with 1 teaspoon Baking soda)
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. In a very large mixing bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking ammonia and salt. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Add the eggs and lemon peel; mix well to form a dough. On a floured surface, roll out the dough to 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into shapes with 2 to 3-inch cookie cutters. Place the cutouts on ungreased cookie sheets. Combine the egg white and water; brush over the tops of the cookies. Sprinkle with sugar. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden. Remove to a wire rack to cool. Drizzle with melted chocolate, if desired. Makes 60 to 84 cookies.
